parameters.content: Luong health check cuoi ngay. Lay danh sach task dang mo tu backend, tong hop nhanh va gui Telegram.
Luong bao cao qua han chieu thu 6. Lay danh sach task overdue, gui report Telegram, sau do tach item va sync ESCALATED ve backend cho tung task.

parameters.message:

{{ $json.taskName }}

parameters.content: Luong nhac nho 8h sang. Lay task dang mo tu backend, tach tung item, loc deadline con <= 3 ngay, gui mail va sync REMINDER_SENT ve Spring Boot.

parameters.jsCode:
const note = $json.note ?? $json.adminNote ?? $json.sourceInput ?? $json.taskDescription ?? 'Keep going.';
return [{ json: { ...$json, quote: note, author: note === 'Keep going.' ? 'System' : 'Manager note' } }];

parameters.content: Webhook task-events nhan su kien tu Spring Boot. Workflow tra response ngay lap tuc de backend khong bi timeout, sau do moi xu ly log, mail, Telegram va cac luong dinh ky.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $json ?? {};
return [{ json: { ...item, overdueDays: item.overdueDays ?? null, escalatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } }];
